versions.version_description: Version 3 is also correct if you transpose it, but this is in the correct key with aligned chords and lyrics

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Standard tuning!
Same chords throughout the whole song: [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 

[Verse]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] 
Bed, stay in bed,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
The feeling of your skin locked in my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Smoke smoke me broke[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]     
I don't care, I'm down for what you want[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                          
Day drunk into the night, wanna keep you here[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch] 
'Cause you dry my tears[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, summer loving and fights[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] 
How it is for us, and it's all because[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Now if we're TALKING BODY[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]           
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Swear it won't take you long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
If you love me right[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
We fuck for life, on and on and on[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]       
Now if we're TALKING BODY[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]  
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Swear it won't take you long[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               
If you love me right[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
We fuck for life, on and on and on[/tab]


[Continue]

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 


[Verse]

Love can be love,
Anything you want I'll give it up
Lips, lips are kiss,
Bite me while I taste your fingertips
Day drunk into the night, wanna keep you here
'Cause you dry my tears
Yeah, summer loving and fights
How it is for us, and it's all because


[Chorus]

Now if we're TALKING BODY
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me
Swear it won't take you long
If you love me right
We fuck for life, on and on and on
Now if we're TALKING BODY
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me
Swear it won't take you long
If you love me right
We fuck for life, on and on and on


[Bridge]

Bodies, oh baby make them bodies
We just use them for fun
Bodies, let's use them 'till every little piece is gone
Let's go! On and on and on
Let's go! On and on and on


[Chorus]

Now if we're TALKING BODY
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me
Swear it won't take you long
If you love me right
We fuck for life, on and on and on
Now if we're TALKING BODY
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me
Swear it won't take you long
If you love me right
We fuck for life, on and on and on


[Outro]

(We're TALKING BODY,
Put it on me
If you love me right
We fuck for life, on and on and on)

Now if we're TALKING BODY
You've got a perfect one, so put it on me
Swear it won't take you long
If you love me right
We fuck for life, on and on and on
